languages.text: Стоит вам взглянуть на эту абоминацию, как из глубин ее корпуса доносится едва уловимое безумное бормотание.
As soon as your eyes fall upon this abomination, barely audible, frantic murmurs come from deep within it.
languages.original_text: Стоит вам взглянуть на эту абоминацию, как из глубин ее корпуса доносится едва уловимое безумное бормотание.

traits.locale_text: As soon as your eyes fall upon this abomination, barely audible, frantic murmurs come from deep within it.
As soon as your eyes fall upon this abomination, barely audible, frantic murmurs come from deep within it.
As soon as your eyes fall upon this abomination, barely audible, frantic murmurs come from deep within it.

languages.text: 你的目光刚落到这亵渎造物上，其深处就隐约传来几不可闻的狂乱低语。
languages.original_text: As soon as your eyes fall upon this abomination, barely audible, frantic murmurs come from deep within it.

traits.locale_text: 你的目光刚落到这亵渎造物上，其深处就隐约传来几不可闻的狂乱低语。

languages.text: En cuanto tu mirada se posa sobre esta abominación, oyes susurros frenéticos desde su interior.
languages.original_text: As soon as your eyes fall upon this abomination, barely audible, frantic murmurs come from deep within it.

traits.locale_text: En cuanto tu mirada se posa sobre esta abominación, oyes susurros frenéticos desde su interior.

languages.text: Vous avez à peine posé les yeux sur cette abomination que des murmures empressés, tout juste audibles, s'élèvent de ses profondeurs.
languages.original_text: As soon as your eyes fall upon this abomination, barely audible, frantic murmurs come from deep within it.

traits.locale_text: Vous avez à peine posé les yeux sur cette abomination que des murmures empressés, tout juste audibles, s'élèvent de ses profondeurs.

languages.text: Gözlerin bu ucubenin üzerine düştüğü anda derinlerinden zar zor duyulan, çılgınca mırıltılar geliyor.
languages.original_text: As soon as your eyes fall upon this abomination, barely audible, frantic murmurs come from deep within it.

traits.locale_text: Gözlerin bu ucubenin üzerine düştüğü anda derinlerinden zar zor duyulan, çılgınca mırıltılar geliyor.

languages.text: Als dein Blick auf diese Abscheulichkeit fällt, ertönt aus ihren Tiefen ein kaum hörbares, ekstatisches Murmeln.
languages.original_text: As soon as your eyes fall upon this abomination, barely audible, frantic murmurs come from deep within it.

traits.locale_text: Als dein Blick auf diese Abscheulichkeit fällt, ertönt aus ihren Tiefen ein kaum hörbares, ekstatisches Murmeln.

languages.text: この忌まわしい存在に目を向けると、その深奥からかすかに聞こえる、慌てたささやきが聞こえてくる。
languages.original_text: As soon as your eyes fall upon this abomination, barely audible, frantic murmurs come from deep within it.

traits.locale_text: この忌まわしい存在に目を向けると、その深奥からかすかに聞こえる、慌てたささやきが聞こえてくる。
